01-ai-meets-project-management.instruction: Write a prompt asking AI to identify which parts of your PM workflow could be automated. Be specific about your current process.
01-ai-meets-project-management.successMessage: Finding automation opportunities is step one of AI-powered PM.

02-project-planning-with-ai.instruction: Write a prompt to generate a project plan with milestones, dependencies, and estimated effort. Include scope and constraints.
02-project-planning-with-ai.successMessage: AI project plans save hours of starting from scratch.

03-meeting-notes-and-action-items.instruction: Write a prompt that extracts from raw meeting notes: decisions, action items (with owners/deadlines), and open questions.
03-meeting-notes-and-action-items.successMessage: This one prompt replaces 30 minutes of post-meeting admin. Every. Single. Time.

04-status-reports-and-updates.instruction: Write a prompt to generate a weekly status report from task data. Highlight wins, blockers, upcoming deadlines.

05-risk-assessment.instruction: Write a prompt for project risk assessment. Include context and ask for risk identification, probability, impact, mitigation.
05-risk-assessment.successMessage: AI systematically identifies risks humans overlook.

06-resource-allocation.instruction: 4 team members, 6 sprint tasks. Describe how you'd use AI to optimize allocation based on skills, availability, priorities.
06-resource-allocation.successMessage: Resource allocation is where PM becomes art. AI shows the math.

07-documentation-and-sops.instruction: Write a prompt to generate an SOP for a process you manage. Include audience, steps, and quality criteria.
07-documentation-and-sops.successMessage: Good SOPs are a gift to your future self. AI writes the first draft in seconds.

08-agile-with-ai.instruction: Write a prompt to generate user stories from a feature description. Include acceptance criteria, story points, edge cases.
08-agile-with-ai.placeholder: From this feature: ... Generate user stories...
08-agile-with-ai.successMessage: AI-generated user stories ensure nothing gets missed in the first pass.

09-stakeholder-communication.instruction: Too technical for executives: 'We refactored the API gateway microservice, reduced p99 latency by 40ms, and migrated CI/CD to GitHub Actions with matrix builds.' Rewrite for non-technical audience.
09-stakeholder-communication.badExample: We refactored the API gateway microservice, reduced p99 latency by 40ms.
09-stakeholder-communication.goodExample: We made our app noticeably faster for customers and upgraded dev tools so the team ships updates twice as fast.
09-stakeholder-communication.successMessage: Translating tech to business impact is a PM superpower.

10-your-ai-pm-toolkit.instruction: Design your AI PM toolkit: 5 recurring tasks, the AI prompt/tool for each, and time saved per week.
10-your-ai-pm-toolkit.successMessage: 5-10 hours saved per week. That's AI-augmented PM.
